calendar.matters:
Pet. For Order To Return Assets Belonging To The Est. Of A. Byrd;For Proceeds Of Rental Income;Conversion;Financial Elder Abuse;Etc.
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Hubert Donalds.

The Court noted that the clerk received a call that Mr. Ukoha-Ajike was ill and would not be attending the hearing. Ms. Ebey reported that the trust owns a piece of real property, that Mr. Ukoha-Ajike's client only has limited powers, that on September 11, 2015 she forwarded an accounting to him but has not heard back and that she does not know why this matter is on calendar. The petition for order to return assets belonging to the estate of A. Byrd; etc., was taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Pet. For Order To Return Assets Belonging To The Est. Of A. Byrd;For Proceeds Of Rental Income;Conversion;Financial Elder Abuse;Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Continued To Nov-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ajike (via court call) for (petitioner) Troylene Trammell. Amanda Ebey for Hubert Donald.

Ms. Ebey reported that she has submitted an accounting to opposing counsel and it is being reviewed, that they both agree that a continuance may result in the dropping of this matter and that they have agreed on selling the property. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike confirmed their agreement and requested a continuance of 60 days for time to sell the property. The petition for order to return assets belonging to the Estate of A. Byrd, etc., was continued to November 2, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Pet. For Order To Return Assets Belonging To The Est. Of A. Byrd;For Proceeds Of Rental Income;Conversion;Financial Elder Abuse;Etc.
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Continued To Aug-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ajike for (petitioner) Troylene Trammell. Amanda Ebey for (Respondent) Hubert Donald.

Mr. Ukoha-Ajike reported that he filed a declaration on 6/1/15 chronologically addressing each title issue and has nothing to add, that everything available regarding the transfer of Howard's share has been provided and that they do not have a current title report. Ms. Ebey stated that in regards to the elder abuse they expect the petition will be dropped, that she has been in communication with Mr. Ukoha-Ajike, that they are waiting on additional bank records to complete the accounting and requested a 2 month continuance. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike stated that he wants an accounting on the rental property and that he wants the property that belongs to the estate. Upon agreement of both counsel the Petition for Order to Return Assets
to the Estate of A. Byrd, etc., was continued to 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
